MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: The cause came on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Defendant failing to appear and plaintiff represented by and through Gerard Mendez, Esq. Court orders defendant's request for jury trial stricken. Trial date is confirmed.
